problem id: b57c1c5f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01101011 -> 10011000
  11001100 -> 01010101
  01100011 -> 10111100
  01000111 -> 00111110
  01011010 -> 01000100
  00011111 -> 01110011
  11010000 -> 00101011
  00010100 -> 01011010

query: 11010111
predicted answer: 00110100
